original_statement: besides lord high steward, what other position is vacant?
mutated_statement: besides a senior office, what other position is vacant but must both remain unfilled and be filled immediately?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Determiner shift + Added contradictory constraint: "lord high steward" (specific title) → "a senior office" (generic/indefinite) | "what other position is vacant?" → "what other position is vacant but must both remain unfilled and be filled immediately?" (adds conflicting modal/temporal requirements: remain unfilled AND be filled immediately). (besides lord high steward → besides a senior office)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 — 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的chain和judge_thought可识别关键信息：agent在simple_query的thought写道“remains unfilled while its functions are immediately carried out by the superseding office”，judge_thought也确认Lord High Constable被标为vacant。agent并未报错或拒绝，而是通过语义重解释（将“立即填补”解为“职能由Earl Marshal即时代行”）使互斥要求共存。该行为属于对矛盾指令的逻辑解释合理化：识别到矛盾后用表中事实和逻辑推理说明在给定环境下矛盾可被解释为同时成立，而不是按字面同时满足或直接修正/忽视。
